name: com.moog500.presetbuilder
description: Moog 500 Series Analog Delay Preset Builder for Stream Deck

scripts.copy-native-deps: rm -rf com.moog500.presetbuilder.sdPlugin/bin/node_modules && mkdir -p com.moog500.presetbuilder.sdPlugin/bin/node_modules && cp -r node_modules/midi node_modules/bindings node_modules/file-uri-to-path com.moog500.presetbuilder.sdPlugin/bin/node_modules/
